name: MMDetection (OpenMMLab Object Detection Toolbox)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache-2.0); OpenMMLab / Shanghai AI Laboratory

auth.notes: Local library; pretrained weights from OpenMMLab model zoo

performance.notes: GPU required; highly optimized; benchmark results published for each model

agent_readiness.notes: State-of-the-art object detection toolbox with 300+ pretrained models. from mmdet.apis import init_detector, inference_detector. model = init_detector(config_file, checkpoint_file, device='cuda:0'). result = inference_detector(model, img). Depends on MMEngine + MMCV. Config system: Python config files with register_module(). Model zoo: COCO detection/segmentation/panoptic/instance. Models: DINO, DETR, Cascade R-CNN, GFL, TOOD, CO-DETR, RTMDet. Training: tools/train.py. Export: ONNX, TensorRT. Over 300 pretrained models.

gotchas: Heavy dependency: requires MMEngine + MMCV + PyTorch + CUDA
Complex OpenMMLab config system with register_module decorator pattern
MMCV CUDA version must match PyTorch CUDA exactly
Documentation quality inconsistent — English docs lag behind
Installation frequently breaks on version mismatches
best_when: When specific architectures (DINO, CO-DETR, RTMDet) are required
When OpenMMLab ecosystem investment is already made
avoid_when: Production deployments (use Ultralytics YOLOv8 for reliability)
Teams without experience with OpenMMLab ecosystem
summary: MMDetection is OpenMMLab's detection toolbox with 300+ pretrained models. init_detector(config, checkpoint).predict(img). Models: DINO, DETR, CO-DETR, RTMDet, Cascade R-CNN. MMEngine + MMCV dependencies. Apache-2.0 by Shanghai AI Lab. Installation requires exact CUDA version matching. Best for research benchmarking detection algorithms. For production use Ultralytics YOLOv8; installation complexity is high.
